title: APIGen API
description: An API definition within a project, including its generation source and lifecycle status.

description.description: Detailed description of what the API does.

generationSource.description: How the API was created: from a natural language prompt, an imported spec, or manually.

prompt.description: The natural language prompt used to generate the API, if applicable.

specUrl.description: URL to the imported OpenAPI specification, if applicable.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the API.

endpointCount.description: Number of endpoints defined in this API.

schemaCount.description: Number of schemas defined in this API.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the API was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the API was last updated.
